headline: ROLLINS ACQUIRES ROMEX PEST CONTROL
summary: Rollins, Inc. today announced that it has acquired Romex Pest Control. Romex employs over 200 teammates and is headquartered in Pleasant Grove, UT. Romex is a "top 40" pest management company according to PCT 100 rankings.
